name: Google Ads
description: Google Ads automation with AI: analyze performance, manage campaigns, optimize bids.
longDescription: Google Ads MCP server by Pipeboard. 35+ tools for managing campaigns, optimizing keywords, analyzing performance, managing ad extensions, and running GAQL queries. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, and any MCP client.
author: co.pipeboard
examplePrompts: Show me all my Google Ads campaigns
Create a new search campaign for summer sale
What are my top performing keywords?
Pause the campaign with lowest ROI
Run a GAQL query for campaign performance
